title: Selling Courses Without Teachable or Gumroad: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, and you've built a course that people are eager to buy. But, when you try to set up a payment system, you're met with a generic message - 'Your country is restricted.' PayPal, Stripe, and other popular payment processors exclude your country, leaving you with no way to get paid. You're not alone. Many creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and other restricted countries face this same issue. The question is, what can you do to sell your course without relying on these restrictive payment processors?
What Each Option Actually Offers

When you look at popular course-selling platforms like Teachable or Gumroad, you might think they're the only way to go. But, let's take a closer look at what each option actually offers. Teachable provides a range of customization options, but it requires a PayPal account to set up, which is a no-go for many creators in restricted countries. Gumroad, on the other hand, allows you to sell digital products directly to customers, but it still requires a PayPal account to receive payments. Meanwhile, platforms like Unchained Commerce provide a range of infrastructure options, including the Admin Dashboard, which allows you to manage your sales, track analytics, and deliver products instantly to customers without relying on PayPal or any other payment processor. With Unchained Commerce, you have the flexibility to choose how you sell your course and get paid.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad take a one-size-fits-all approach. They shut down access to creators in certain countries, citing 'compliance' or 'security' reasons. But, what about creators in these countries who genuinely want to sell their courses and earn a living? Unchained Commerce takes a different approach. They recognize that every creator is unique and deserves a solution that works for them, not against them. With Unchained Commerce, you can set up a payment system that works with your specific needs, regardless of your country of origin.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When you're selling digital products, payment speed, fees, and real costs can add up quickly. With PayPal or Stripe, you'll typically face high fees, ranging from 2.9% + 30¢ per transaction to 3.5% + 30¢ per transaction. And, if you're in a restricted country, you might even face additional fees or penalties. Unchained Commerce takes a more transparent approach. Their payment processor, NOWPayments, charges a flat fee of 0.5% per transaction, with no additional fees or penalties. This means you can keep more of the money you earn from selling your course.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery capabilities, Unchained Commerce shines. With their Admin Dashboard, you can set up automated delivery of your course to customers, eliminating the need for manual intervention. You can also track analytics, monitor sales, and receive instant notifications whenever a customer purchases your course. This means you can focus on creating more content and growing your business, rather than getting bogged down in administrative tasks.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is best for you? If you want a platform that works seamlessly with your course-selling needs, without relying on PayPal or any other payment processor, Unchained Commerce is the way to go. With their flexible infrastructure options, you can set up a payment system that works for you, not against you. And, with their transparent fees and automated delivery capabilities, you can focus on growing your business and earning a living doing what you love.

Your Action Checklist

To start selling your course without Teachable or Gumroad, follow these steps: Sign up for Unchained Commerce and choose the Admin Dashboard as your infrastructure option. Set up your payment system using NOWPayments, their transparent and low-fee payment processor. Create a sales page for your course and add a payment button. Set up automated delivery of your course to customers, using the Admin Dashboard. Monitor sales and track analytics to see how your course is performing. Adjust your marketing strategy as needed to continue growing your business. With these steps, you can start selling your course without any restrictions, and focus on growing your business and earning a living doing what you love.
